polymarket.title: Will Ethereum dip to $1,500 by December 31, 2026?

polymarket_summary.summary:
We need to produce exactly ONE paragraph, starting with either 'Bullish:', 'Bearish:', or 'Mixed:' followed by specific reasons. Mention numbers and names where available. Max 80 words. Data: only one market: "Will Ethereum dip to $1,500 by December 31, 2026?: Yes 38% (vol $227,833)". So sentiment: 38% chance of dip to $1500 by end 2026. That suggests moderate bearish expectation? Actually probability of dip is 38% (<50), so less likely to dip, implying bullish sentiment (Ethereum likely stays above $1500). So we can say Bullish: because only 38% expect dip, volume $227,833 indicates moderate interest. Must be one paragraph, start with "Bullish:" then reasons. Max 80 words. Let's craft ~40 words.

"Bullish: Prediction markets assign only a 38% probability that Ethereum will fall to $1,500 by Dec 31 2026, with $227,833 traded, indicating traders largely expect ETH to stay above that level; the relatively low dip probability and notable volume reflect confidence in Ethereum’s medium‑term price resilience."
